Atheism is not believing in a God
Some people say it extends to not believing in religion in general, but that is generally called [[antitheism]]
Atheism contrasts with [[theism]] and [[antitheism]] contrasts with [[protheism]]

[[Category:Religion]]
[[Category:Pages that existed before the Great November Outage]]
[[sn:Atheism]][[sn:Atheism]][[Category:Stubs]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
